ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "species" INTEGER /* Species to which the sequence belongs */,
  "locus_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the genomic locus */,
  "seq_id_original" TEXT /* Original identifier for the sequence */,
  "locus_position" TEXT /* Position of the sequence within the locus */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "effective_length" INTEGER /* Effective length of the sequence after filtering */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content percentage of the sequence */,
  "gc_skew" REAL /* GC skew of the sequence */,
  "n_content" REAL /* N content (unknown nucleotides) percentage of the sequence */,
  "locus_class" INTEGER /* Class of the locus (e.g., siLocus, fiLocus) */,
  "gene_count" TEXT /* Number of genes in the sequence */,
  "seq_unannot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the sequence is unannotated */,
  "flank_gene_orient" INTEGER /* Orientation of genes flanking the sequence */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the assembly */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence (e.g., lab, public database) */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Sequencing technology used */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was generated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the sequence */,
  "taxonomic_classification" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_locus_id FOREIGN KEY ("locus_id") REFERENCES loci ("locus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy identifier for the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loci" (
  "locus_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each locus */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the locus is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the locus */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the locus */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the locus */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of genomic region (e.g., coding, non-coding) */,
  "region_function" TEXT /* Function of the genomic region */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number from public databases */,
  "reference_sequence" TEXT /* Reference sequence ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, deprecated) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence containing the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene within the sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene within the sequence */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function or description of the gene */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Gene family to which the gene belongs */,
  "gene_ontology_id" TEXT /* Gene Ontology (GO) ID */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "expression_tissue" TEXT /* Tissue where the gene is expressed */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Known disease associations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene, motif) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the annotation within the sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the annotation within the sequence */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the annotation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or details of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence supporting the annotation (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, annotator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "gene_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., function, expression pattern) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or details of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence supporting the annotation (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motif_annotations" (
  "motif_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motif annotation */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation associated with the motif */,
  "motif_name" TEXT /* Name of the motif */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or details of the motif */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence supporting the annotation (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motif_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motif_annotations_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence file */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sequence file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the sequence file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., FASTA, GenBank) */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the file */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Type of file compression (e.g., gzip, bz2) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_files_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)
